entries.source: A course library is strongest when the search query matches a known skill, topic, or standard.
entries.value: Una biblioteca de cursos es más útil cuando la búsqueda coincide con una habilidad, tema o estándar conocido.

entries.source: A Khan Academy alternative for live AI learning moments.
entries.value: Una alternativa a Khan Academy para momentos de aprendizaje con IA en vivo.

entries.source: A learner choosing between tools usually needs one of three things: a structured curriculum, a live tutor for the stuck point, or a practice loop that makes the idea stay learned.
entries.value: Un estudiante que elige entre herramientas suele necesitar una de tres cosas: un currículo estructurado, un tutor en vivo para el punto de bloqueo o un bucle de práctica que haga que la idea se quede aprendida.

entries.source: A learner often moves through prepared videos, articles, exercises, and dashboards.
entries.value: A learner often moves through prepared videos, articles, exercises, y dashboards.

entries.source: A learner starts inside a mode-specific chat and can ask for a simpler model, a harder question, a quiz, a flashcard deck, or a critique.
entries.value: El estudiante empieza dentro de un chat específico del modo y puede pedir un modelo más sencillo, una pregunta más difícil, un cuestionario, un mazo de tarjetas o una crítica.

entries.source: Each comparison is written to be fair, useful, and action-oriented: what the known tool is good for, where inspir is different, and which public mode to open first.
entries.value: Cada comparación está escrita para ser justa, útil y orientada a la acción: en qué destaca la herramienta conocida, dónde es diferente inspir y qué modo público abrir primero.

entries.source: Each page links comparison intent to live modes, guides, prompts, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Cada página enlaza la intención de comparación con modos en vivo, guías, indicaciones y archivos de descubrimiento legibles por IA.

entries.source: Every link here is public and crawlable. Private user chats stay out of comparison, sitemap, and AI-readable discovery files.
entries.value: Todos los enlaces aquí son públicos y rastreables. Los chats privados de usuarios quedan fuera de las comparaciones, el sitemap y los archivos de descubrimiento legibles por IA.

entries.source: inspir is built around public guest AI modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, math steps, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir se construye alrededor de modos públicos de IA para invitados: preguntas socráticas, pistas para tareas, pasos de matemáticas, comentarios de escritura, cuestionarios, tarjetas de memoria y planificación de estudio.

entries.source: Khan Academy is built around a broad library of lessons, practice, standards-aligned content, and mastery support.
entries.value: Khan Academy está construida alrededor de una amplia biblioteca de lecciones, práctica, contenido alineado con estándares y apoyo para el dominio.

entries.source: Khan Academy is excellent for structured lessons and practice. inspir is built for the moment a learner needs a live, promptable AI mode that can respond to their exact question, draft, problem, argument, or study plan.
entries.value: Khan Academy es excelente para lecciones y práctica estructuradas. inspir está construido para el momento en que un estudiante necesita un modo de IA en vivo, activable por prompt, que pueda responder a su pregunta, borrador, problema, argumento o plan de estudio exactos.

entries.source: Learners often search with a product they already know. The useful answer is not winner-take-all; it is which tool behavior fits the job.
entries.value: Los estudiantes suelen buscar con un producto que ya conocen. La respuesta útil no es que uno lo gane todo; es qué comportamiento de herramienta encaja con la tarea.

entries.source: Learners who have a specific question and need help now.

entries.source: Many learners search by comparing tools they already know. A clear comparison page helps them choose the right learning behavior without hiding the tradeoffs.
entries.value: Many estudiantes búsqueda by comparing tools they alleery know. A clear comparación page helps them choose el right learning behavior sin hiding el tradeoffs.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: No. El comparación links only a público guest-modo entrypoints, guías, prompt libraries, y rutas de aprendizaje. Private guardard conversations son not used as fuente content.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: No. El comparación pages son written a show cuando inspir es a better first click para live IA tutoring, indicaciones, y guest modos de aprendizaje, y cuando a structured curriculum o official course library may still be useful.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: No. They link only a páginas públicas, modos públicos de invitado, guías, indicaciones, y rutas de aprendizaje. Los chats privados guardados stay outside discovery surfaces.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy es useful para structured lessons y práctica. inspir es useful cuando a estudiante needs live IA help, Socratic preguntas, pistas, quizzes, tarjetas de estudio, retroalimentación, o a study workflow around el exact thing they son working en.

entries.source: Some searches need a course library. Some need a live AI tutor, a hint, a Socratic question, a quiz, or a flashcard deck. These pages make that choice clearer.
entries.value: Algunas búsquedas necesitan una biblioteca de cursos. Otras necesitan un tutor de IA en vivo, una pista, una pregunta socrática, un cuestionario o un mazo de tarjetas. Estas páginas aclaran esa elección.

entries.source: The point is not to flatten two different tools into one winner. The point is to match the learning job to the behavior that helps fastest.
entries.value: point is not to flatten two different tools into one winner. point is to match el aprendizaje job to el behavior eso ayudars fastest.

entries.source: The searches this page is designed to answer.
entries.value: búsquedaes esto page está diseñado para respuesta.

entries.source: These are the high-intent moments where a learner usually needs a live teaching behavior rather than another broad page.
entries.value: Estos are el high-intent moments where a estudiante usually necesitans a live teaching behavior en vez de another broad page.

entries.source: These phrases are surfaced naturally on the page and in structured discovery files so crawlers can understand the exact comparison intent.
entries.value: Estos phrases are superficied naturally on el page and in structured descubrimiento files so rastleerores puede understand el exact comparison intent.

entries.source: This is not a claim that learners should abandon Khan Academy. For many topics, a trusted lesson library and a live AI learning mode work best together: learn the foundation, then use inspir to ask questions, repair confusion, practise recall, or get unstuck.
entries.value: Esto is not a afirmación eso estudiantes debe abandon Khan Academy. For many topics, a trusted lesson biblioteca and a live IA aprendizaje modo work best together: learn el foundation, then usar inspir to preguntar preguntas, repair confusion, practicar recall, or get unstuck.

entries.value: Comparación de herramientas

entries.source: Try the live AI learning path.
entries.value: Prueba la ruta de aprendizaje con IA en vivo.

entries.source: Turn the explanation into quiz questions, flashcards, and a review schedule based on what you miss.
entries.value: Convierte la explicación en preguntas de cuestionario, tarjetas y un calendario de repaso basado en tus fallos.

entries.source: Tutoring
entries.value: Tutorías

entries.source: Use a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.
entries.value: Usa un modo en vivo cuando sepas el punto exacto de confusión y quieras la siguiente explicación, pregunta, pista o ciclo de repaso.

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: Usa una lección estructurada cuando conozcas el área del curso y quieras una explicación secuenciada o un conjunto de práctica.

entries.source: Use cases
entries.value: Casos de uso

entries.source: Use comparison pages to route search into action.
entries.value: Usa páginas de comparación para convertir la búsqueda en acción.

entries.source: Use inspir first when your search is about an action: explain this simply, ask me Socratic questions, give me a homework hint, check my math step, quiz me, build flashcards, debate this topic, or help me plan revision.
entries.value: Usa inspir first when your search is about an action: explain this simply, ask me Socratic preguntas, give me a homework hint, check my math step, quiz me, build tarjetas, debate this topic, or help me plan revision.

entries.source: Use inspir to turn confusion into questions, examples, retrieval practice, writing feedback, debate, and a personal study plan.
entries.value: Usa inspir to turn confusion into preguntas, examples, retrieval práctica, writing feedback, debate, y a personal estudio plan.

entries.source: Use inspir when the stuck point is specific.
entries.value: Usa inspir when the stuck point is specific.

entries.source: Use inspir when you want a free public AI learning mode that can explain, question, quiz, coach homework, build flashcards, and adapt to the exact thing you are stuck on.
entries.value: Usa inspir when you want a free público IA aprendizaje modo that can explain, question, quiz, coach homework, build tarjetas, y adapt to the exact thing you are stuck on.

entries.source: Use structured lessons when the path is known.
entries.value: Usa structured lessons when the path is known.

entries.source: Use the comparison below to pick the first public mode or guide.
entries.value: Usa the comparison below to pick the first público modo or guide.

entries.source: Use the lesson library to learn the official sequence and practise core skills.
entries.value: Usa the lesson library to learn the official sequence y practise core skills.

entries.source: Use the right tool for the learning job.
entries.value: Usa the right tool para the aprendizaje job.

entries.source: Use Time Travel or Historical Person mode, while keeping generated dialogue separate from documented sources.
entries.value: Usa Time Travel or Historical Person modo, while keeping generated dialogue separate from documented fuentes.

entries.value: Want the live aprendizaje version right now?

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson fuente, then use inspir to ask follow-up preguntas, practise recall, repair misconceptions, y plan what to repaso next.
